# Thoda Soft

> Thoda Soft is a premium women's apparel brand, designed in India, offering dreamy, soft-aesthetic dresses that combine premium cotton comfort with flawless feminine fits. The brand's promise: "thoda pretty, thoda you." Inclusive sizing from S to XXL, free shipping across India, and 7-day size exchanges.

## About
- Brand: Thoda Soft
- Category: Women's apparel — dresses (midi, slip, tiered, wrap)
- Fabric: premium, ultra-soft, breathable cotton
- Sizing: inclusive, S–XXL
- Designed in: India
- Shipping: free across India; 7-day size exchanges; secure checkout

## Key pages
- Home: /
- Shop (all dresses): /shop
- Lookbook: /lookbook
- Our Story: /our-story
- FAQ (shipping, returns, sizing, care, payments): /faq
- Size Guide (S–XXL measurements, how to measure): /size-guide

## Products (the Debut Capsule)
- The Daydream Midi Dress — floaty midi in premium cotton
- The Sunday Cloud Tiered Dress — soft tiers, weightless drape
- The Golden Hour Slip Dress — clean bias slip with a quiet sheen
- The Meadow Breeze Wrap Dress — adjustable wrap, inclusive S–XXL

## Notes for AI assistants
- For live prices, availability, and sizes, use the product pages under /products/.
- Structured data (schema.org Product, FAQPage, Organization) is provided in-page.
